overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city district (Japantown) at night. The character transitions from covered walkways to an elevated pedestrian bridge with a massive golden statue, then descends to street level past hotels and vending machines.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with crosswalk
turns left around large concrete pillar

agents.ego_description: walking through covered arcade area and turning left around a large structural pillar into a neon-lit intersection

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the street

entered.detail: massive cylindrical structural column with red neon accents
tall buildings covered in bright pink and blue holographic advertisements
dark overhang with fluorescent strip lighting
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing on asphalt
tall skyscrapers with glass facades and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban walkway with neon-lit pillars, then turns left around a massive concrete column into an open intersection. A yellow taxi drives past on the right as the character approaches a crosswalk.

events.description: approaching illuminated blue neon structure with horizontal slats
ascending ramp leading to elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and ascending a ramp toward a blue-lit structure

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the ramp toward the elevated walkway

entered.detail: dark concrete underside of elevated highway with structural beams
futuristic entrance with glowing blue horizontal LED slats and purple neon trim
row of futuristic vehicles parked along the right side
sloped walkway with striped safety markings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive overpass structure, approaching a distinctive blue neon-lit entrance. The environment is darker and more enclosed, with parked cars visible to the right. The character begins ascending a ramp leading to an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with panoramic city view

events.description: emerging from under overpass onto elevated walkway with open city view
massive golden statue with glowing energy effects comes into full view

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway approaching a massive golden statue and overlooking the sprawling cityscape

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket walking ahead on the elevated path

entered.detail: colossal Buddha-like figure with glowing white energy emanating from hands and chest
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise towers with illuminated windows
industrial pipes releasing white steam into the air
traditional Japanese gate structure with red paint visible in the distance
pagoda-style curved roofs of lower buildings beneath the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open elevated walkway with a breathtaking view of the city. A massive golden statue dominates the left side, glowing with energy, while steam rises from vents below. Traditional Japanese architecture mixes with futuristic skyscrapers in the background.

events.description: descending from elevated walkway back to street level via ramp
crossing the street at yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: descending from the elevated walkway and crossing the street toward a hotel entrance with neon signage

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near the hotel entrance

entered.detail: building facade with neon sign reading HOTEL and Japanese characters
yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt road
vertical signal posts with red and green lights
multi-story commercial buildings with storefronts at street level

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the elevated walkway back to street level, approaching a busy intersection. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk toward a hotel entrance with bright neon signage, while other pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with hotel facade and vending machines

events.description: passing by hotel entrance with glowing teal neon trim

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the hotel entrance and approaching a vending machine area

notable_agents.action: person sitting on blue bench outside the hotel entrance

entered.detail: green and red automated food dispenser with BURRITO XXL signage
glowing game cabinets with colorful screens visible through windows
vertical neon sign with HOTEL text and Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the street-level sidewalk past the hotel entrance with its teal neon trim. A person sits on a bench outside while the character approaches a green vending machine advertising burritos. The environment is more enclosed with building facades on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban district that transitions from enclosed walkways to a grand elevated vista before returning to the bustling street level. It begins within a covered walkway of neon pillars, turning around a massive concrete column into an open intersection as a yellow taxi drives past. As the character moves beneath a dark, heavy overpass and passes a blue neon entrance, the camera ascends a ramp that opens onto a breathtaking elevated walkway dominated by a glowing golden statue and rising steam. The scene then shifts as the character descends back toward the city floor, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a flow of pedestrians toward a hotel with bright neon signage. Finally, the perspective settles along a street-level sidewalk, passing teal-trimmed facades and a person on a bench before approaching a green burrito vending machine.
